name: @ninglo/remotelab
description: Remote browser access to any CLI dev tool (Claude, Copilot, Codex, Cline and more) via HTTPS
author: Ninglo

scripts.test:smoke: node tests/test-session-naming.mjs && node tests/test-cloudflared-config.mjs && node tests/test-history-index-contract.mjs && node tests/test-session-route-utils.mjs && node tests/test-session-external-trigger-refresh.mjs && node tests/test-session-label-prompt-context.mjs && node tests/test-agent-mailbox.mjs && node tests/test-agent-mail-worker.mjs && node tests/test-agent-mail-reply.mjs
scripts.prepublishOnly: chmod +x cli.js setup.sh start.sh stop.sh claude-ttyd-session
